name: Ubiteq, Inc.
summary: Ubiteq, Inc. engages in the development and provision of IoT solutions. The company is involved in the design, manufacture, and quality assurance of electronic devices; design, development, and maintenance of software products; and provision of cloud services, as well as consulting on embedded system security. It also provides telematics platform to get the operation status of vehicles; car sharing platform for shared use of multiple vehicles; work mate system to support the safety of the workers; room concier, a meeting room management system; video conferencing system; and factory equipment real time monitoring system. In addition, the company offers health and safety/watching and data analysis solutions, as well as solutions for visualization of equipment operations. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Tokyo, Japan. Ubiteq, Inc. operates as a subsidiary of ORIX Corporation.
